profiles.description: Electronic switches and dimmers with Energy Measurement and Local Control

item.description: Power Failure Detection not detected/not supported/disabled
Over current switch off: ready / not supported
output value not valid / not set
Dim to new output level - dim timer 1
Dim to new output level - dim timer 2
Dim to new output level - dim timer 3
All output channels supported by the device
output value not valid / not set
Over current shut down: static off
Over current shut down: automatic restart
Reset over current shut down: not active
Reset over current shut down: trigger signal
All output channels supported by the device

value.description: Maximum time between two subsequent actuator messages
Minimum time between two subsequent actuator messages

rangeitem.description: Timer to automatically set OFF output channel when it is set ON
Timer to automatically set OFF output channel when it is set ON

item.description: Change of key state sets ON or OFF
Specific ON/OFF positions. ON when contacts are closed. OFF when contacts are open.

rangeitem.description: Timer to automatically set OFF output channel when it is set ON
Timer to automatically set OFF output channel when it is set ON

item.description: Change of key state sets ON or OFF
Specific ON/OFF positions. ON when contacts are closed. OFF when contacts are open.
